name: Face Detection
description: Detect faces across the archive and write to DB
shell_command: docker exec ourkin-worker-face python -m face extract {path}

params.name: path
params.label: Target path
params.hint: Path to scan for photos. The face worker will walk this directory recursively.

name: Face Clustering
description: Run DBSCAN on all face embeddings in the DB
shell_command: docker exec ourkin-worker-face python -m face cluster --eps {eps} --min-samples {min_samples}

params.name: eps
params.label: DBSCAN eps
params.hint: Max cosine distance within a cluster (0.0–1.0). Lower = stricter. 0.4 is a good default.

params.name: min_samples
params.label: Min samples
params.hint: Minimum faces to form a cluster. Higher = only frequent faces cluster.
